source: Courtyard offers-made screenshots supplied by user
redaction: No account, wallet, payment, address, or shipping details captured.

offers.title: 2025 One Piece OP13-Carrying on His Will #120 Sabo
offers.rationale: Good character and set, but the PSA 10 Sabo offer at $19 is much stronger. Keep only if you want both or lose the PSA 10.

offers.title: 2026 One Piece Starter Deck ST29-Egghead #001 Monkey D. Luffy - Black & White Alternate Art
offers.rationale: Current-cycle Luffy with strong visual identity. Good if you keep discipline and do not chase far past the low $30s without comps.

offers.title: 2024 One Piece Japanese PRB01-Premium Booster - One Piece Card the Best #119 Monkey D. Luffy
offers.rationale: Luffy is liquid, but PSA 9 modern Japanese premium-booster cards need strict caps.

offers.title: 2024 One Piece OP09-Emperors in the New World #118 Gol D. Roger
offers.rationale: Roger is a franchise apex character. Keep the PSA 9 and cancel the lower-grade duplicate.

offers.title: 2024 One Piece Japanese OP07-500 Years in the Future #119 Portgas D. Ace
offers.rationale: Ace has emotional collector demand and pairs well with Luffy/Sabo family thesis.

offers.title: 2023 Wings of the Captain OP06 Japanese #OP06-069 Vinsmoke Reiju
offers.rationale: Cheap and high grade, but not core to the current Luffy/Zoro/Warlords/Roger/Ace/Sabo plan.

offers.title: 2024 Premium Booster: The Best PRB-01 Japanese #OP02-018 Marco - Alternate Art Parallel
offers.rationale: Pristine label is attractive, but Marco is lower priority than the family/apex-character bids.

offers.title: 2009 OnePy BB Match - Promos - Japanese #SW-003-W Shiki
offers.rationale: Interesting older oddball, but CGC 8 and not the modern Bandai One Piece Card Game lane. Cancel for focus.

offers.title: 2025 Premium Booster: The Best Vol.2 PRB-02 English #OP09-093 Marshall D. Teach - EN above Japan on Border
offers.rationale: Blackbeard is a major villain and the price is tiny. Keep only if the bid book remains under budget.

offers.title: 2024 Emperors in the New World OP09 Japanese #OP09-118 Gol D. Roger
offers.rationale: Duplicate Roger at a weaker grade. Keep the PSA 9 instead.

offers.title: 2022 One Piece Japanese Starter Deck ST01-Straw Hat Crew #001 Monkey D. Luffy
offers.rationale: Early Luffy starter-deck identity is fine at low cost, but avoid overloading PSA 9 Luffy duplicates.

offers.title: 2025 Carrying on His Will OP13 English #OP13-042 Edward Newgate
offers.rationale: Whitebeard plus OP13 plus pristine label is a strong cheap hold if it stays near this price.

offers.title: 2025 One Piece OP13-Carrying on His Will #120 Sabo
offers.rationale: Best visible risk/reward: OP13, Sabo, PSA 10, and only $1 above the PSA 9 bid.
